descriptions.text: Players control Tor and Roberta, two animal-like Neopets on a quest against evil. By switching between the two at any time, players can use Tor's up-close melee attacks or cause damage from afar with Roberta's spells. This game stays faithful to the traditional third-person action-adventure. Magical items and weapons gained along the way will develop the characters' abilities and strengths. In particular, elementally-aligned motes can be attached to weapons and armor as a combat bonus. There are many puzzles and side-quests along the way, and players will fight evil Neopets.

Neopets: The Darkest Faerie is a 2005 action-adventure game developed by Idol Minds and published by Sony Computer Entertainment for the PlayStation 2. It was only released in North America and is a spin-off of the browser game Neopets.
Neopets: The Darkest Faerie has received mixed critical reviews.
